name: Avatar
tagline: Talk to a lifelike face — LLM replies with expressive speech and movement
description: A conversational companion with a human-like animated head. Your messages go to an LLM; replies are spoken with neural text-to-speech while the face lip-syncs to the audio and shows subtle idle motion (blinks, micro-expressions, gentle head movement).

stack.frontend: Vanilla JS + Web Audio API + CSS

env_vars.description: OpenAI API key for chat and TTS
OpenAI TTS voice: alloy, echo, fable, onyx, nova, shimmer (default: nova)
